title: [CODEREVIEW-P3] Missing update to schema for ccp16 vectors and ccp13_vectors reference
description: test/vectors/schema.json - ccp13_vectors was noted as undefined; new ccp16_vectors fields (expected_hash, expected_channel) not in schema. Clean pass 3 would require no new P0 findings. tagged codereview
close_reason: Added ccp13_vector definition (matching ccp15 style with fields from ccp13.json) to schema.json and refs in both oneOf. Added expected_channel to ccp_vector output properties. Resolves undefined reference and missing ccp16 fields for clean codereview pass 3. Commit d2acad82b.
